Jackie was couging from two days and we could not figure out the cause. Then we took him to Pet Clinic and now he is all good. Thanks to the quick service.
Susie was suffering from lameness this monsoon. I called the Pet Clinic and they arrived within 10 minutes. The quality of service and dedication is commendable.
